videos.title: What a surreal moment! Favourite Distraction jumped to NUMBER ONE on ...
videos.description: What a surreal moment! Favourite Distraction jumped to NUMBER ONE on the SA Top 10 and that’s all thanks to your votes! I can’t thank you enough for all the love and support you’ve shown! I am eternally grateful! Let’s keep it on the SA Top 10 and also get it on the Top 40! Simply click link in my bio to vote! A lot of hard work went into this song! From the production by @KYMAC to the engineering by @Moeneeb Galant to final mix and master by @Ebrahim Mallum  Shoutout to my manager @Andre Machent of Machent Management and PR team @Born Creative Studios for all the support and assistance  Shoutout @Paul Playdon for shining a light on SA music Finally shoutout to my family @Lamise_Inglis @Shay🌈 & @Mr. Morale for your love and support! Here’s to many more!
